title: Highguard and Geoff Keighley got Exposed (it's bad)
description:
New information has surfaced regarding Highguard and their funding that completely contradicts the picture WIldlight and Geoff Keighley of the Game Awards were trying to paint. On top of that, the official site is still down and the dev response from Wildlight is awful to say the least. All that and more in today's latest.
